creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
beech       2007-12-13 03:11:02 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    ftp/smbftpd          Makefile distinfo 
  Removed files:
    ftp/smbftpd/files    patch-Makefile.in 
  Log:
  - Update to 0.9.7
  
  - Bug fixes:
  - Support PROT in SSL mode. Fixes:
  - Filezilla, TurboFTP fail to connect in SSLv3 mode.
  - Fix vulnerability caused by misuse of fprintf().
  
  PR:             ports/117908
  Approved by:    Jui-Nan Lin <jnlin@csie.nctu.edu.tw> (maintainer),
                  linimon (mentor)
  Security:       http://www.vuxml.org/freebsd/b2571f88-a867-11dc-a6f0-00a0cce0781e.html
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2       +1 -1      ports/ftp/smbftpd/Makefile
  1.2       +3 -3      ports/ftp/smbftpd/distinfo
  1.2       +0 -13     ports/ftp/smbftpd/files/patch-Makefile.in (dead)
